time_series_inference.interval_min: computed per site_id and replicate from timestamp differences; common intervals are 10 or 60 minutes
time_series_inference.reasoning: Multiple timestamped observations per sensor from 2017-05-26 to 2020-10-23.

experimental_context.implementation: Join SM_SWC.csv to Microclimate_Sensors.csv and retain Treatment == 'ctl'.

similar_dataset_reference.reason: Fold-local exemplar uses SWC sensor data, joins sensor metadata, filters experimental warming/manipulation records to controls, and computes interval_min per sensor time series.

open_questions: Sensor installation depth is not reported in the available held-out raw files, so depth_m is left missing.
Five retained control site IDs do not have exact Location_ID matches in the raw location registry and should be treated as g2 for location purposes.
